description: Manzana tea light holder black. Discover the perfect combination of elegance and versatility with our metal tea light holder. The lanterns in timeless metal mesh add a touch of aesthetic chic to your table decoration, whether at weddings or romantic evenings. These candle holders are ideal for small pillar candles and tea lights and rely on high-quality material for a secure stand and unique look. These lanterns with base bring Scandinavian flair to your living room and provide a cosy atmosphere. This tea light holder is not only a decoration, but also a creative gift idea. Use the candle holders as party favours. Immerse yourself in the charm of the country house style with the modern designed metal lanterns and create a welcoming atmosphere. Whether as a candle holder, candle holder or votive candle holder? This set offers a variety of uses. The tea light holders are not only decorative but also functional and can be used as stylish decorative objects on the windowsill. With our metal tea light holder, you can set accents in your home and create an atmospheric table decoration. Treat yourself to this touch of luxury and give your evenings that certain something? Whether dating or simply relaxing in the living room.
